title: pasania cornea
intro: Pasania cornea, also known as Pasania cornea (synonym, Michelia champaca), is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical forests of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pasania cornea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Pasania cornea can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Asian medicine as a dried leaf or root extract.
